title: Duper's Auto Walk: Barebones
description: A simple mod that allows you to auto walk through your minecraft worlds!
body:
# Duper's Auto Walk: Barebones This is an even simpler mod that adds a keybind, allowing the player to move forward without pressing the **W** key! Currently available for all the 1.21.x versions, and for both Fabric and NeoForge! **WARNING: make sure that when using this mod on a server, you are not breaking any rules! Auto Walking is some times considered unfair advantage**

## Compatibility - The Fabric version supports **ModMenu**, allowing the user to customize the Auto Walking Icon's position and whether it should be shown or not. - Compatibility with InvMove is currently not reliable. ## Contacts Issues - [https://github.com/DuperKnight/DuperAutoWalk-Barebones/issues](https://github.com/DuperKnight/DuperAutoWalk-Barebones/issues)
